title: eurybia spinulosa
intro: Eurybia spinulosa, also known as the spinulose sea urchin, is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of flowering plant that grows in coastal areas and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Eurybia spinulosa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
